titleStmt.title: SII 38.30: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 30. (A.R. No. 30 of 1912.) KŪVAM, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the slabs removed from a maṇḍapa and placed in the courtyard of Tripurāntakēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: ⎯⎯ Year: Śaka 1536, Rākshasa, Mārgaḻi 2, Friday = 2nd December 1614 A.D. but the cyclic Year was Ānanda.

summary.p: It records that Pūvākkai Mudaliyār, son of Vallappākkam Vāḻavachchār, the agent (pārapattiyam) of Immaḍi Seṉṉama Nāyakkar, Koṇḍamarāśa (a native of Koṟaṇḍil) and the ūravar of Kūvam made some gift for conducting special offerings and worship, (on every Friday) Sukkiṟavārach-chiṟappu to the goddess Kulammaittāyar.
Tyāgasamudira brahmārāyar, Archchiyappar and Uttaṇḍi figure as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vicaiyāṟ putaiya cālivāhaṉa cakāttam 1000 5 100 3 10 6� meṟcellā niṉṟa rākṣata varuṣam mārkaḻi mātam 2vatu cukkiṟa vāraṉāḷ śrīmatu Immaṭi ceṉṉamaṉāyakka
rayyaṉ Avarkaḷ kāriyattukku kaṟtarāna pārapattiyam vallappākkam vāḻavaccār puttirar pūvākkai mutaliyārum kaṭaikkūṭṭu koṟaṇṭil koṇṭamarācāvum
kūvam Ūravarum payyaraval kulammait tāyār cukkiṟavārac ciṟappukku kaṭṭaḷai yiṭṭa viparam ciṟappukku puka Āka varuṣam 1kku ciṟappu 5 10 4kku paṇṭāra
c ciṟappukku tānattār ciṟappukku maturāṉtaka viḻupparaiyar Uḷḷiṭṭār ciṟappu 7 Utaiyāticcatevar Uḷḷiṭṭār ciṟappu 7 maṟuṅkayar Uḷḷiṭṭārum ventarum ciṟappukku to
ṇṭaimāṉkaḷ ciṟappuvaruṣam Iruṅkāṇūr kiḻavāḷ kumāratti(r) veṉṟa ka ṇakku ma ṇikkaṉppiḷḷai 1 Āka ciṟappu 5 5 cepayyāval kulammaiṉācciyāṟku
cukkiṟavārac ciṟappu kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom vittuppaṭṭa kotāṉa pārampariyamāka ṉaṭattak kaṭavārākavum yinta taṟmattukku yātoruvar Akitam niṇaittaper keṅkaik karaiyi
le kārām pacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile poka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku tiyākacamuttirapiramārāyar Aricciyappar Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
